figures.caption: Figure 2: Nonlinear dynamics of a nonholonomic two-wheeled robot

Figure 4: Networked trajectory tracking for three directed topologies. Top row (non-adversarial case): vehicle trajectories under star (Gs), cyclic (Gc), and path (Gp) graphs, and the corresponding averaged tracking and disagreement errors. Bottom row (adversarial case): trajectories and errors under the same topologies with corrupted information exchange. The error plots report the average leader-tracking error ẽ(t) = 1 m ∑m i=1 ∥yi − y0∥ and the average disagreement ϵ̃(t) = 1 m ∑m i=1 ∥yi − zi∥.
